barrier_bundle_equivalence.policy: Barrier bundles may group control checks but may not merge role bodies, grant Controller authority, use AI discretion to skip gates, or complete without all legacy obligations.

entries.legacy_obligation: Formal FlowPilot startup asks background-agent permission, scheduled-continuation permission, and display surface, then stops immediately until explicit answers arrive. The old run-mode question is retired.
entries.missing_work: Covered by runtime regression rejecting banner/run-shell before explicit startup answers; keep this test in sync with the boot action list.

entries.legacy_obligation: Every formal invocation creates a fresh .flowpilot/runs/<run-id> root; old state, old assets, screenshots, icons, and agent ids do not become current control state.
entries.missing_work: Continuation quarantine now marks prior run files, old assets, and old agent ids as audit-only. Expand imported-artifact disposition when old runs are intentionally imported.

entries.legacy_obligation: The active FlowPilot crew has six role slots: PM, human-like reviewer, process FlowGuard officer, product FlowGuard officer, worker A, and worker B. Controller is not a crew approver.
entries.missing_work: Connect live subagent ids, same-task memory packets, replacement-from-memory, and role authority validators.

entries.legacy_obligation: Controller relays, checks, records, and waits. It does not inspect sealed bodies, create project evidence, approve gates, or infer progress from chat history.
entries.missing_work: Keep adding role-isolation tests as new packet-loop actions are introduced.

entries.legacy_obligation: Role instructions are small, role-scoped system cards delivered only after prompt manifest checks.
entries.missing_work: Extend the card set and coverage validator as new cards are added.

entries.legacy_obligation: PM, reviewer, officers, workers, and user intake move through ledger-checked packet/mail delivery, not broad prompt context.
entries.missing_work: Generic PM role-work packets now provide the base sealed-envelope path and officer request lifecycle index. Keep adding field-level report validators as modeling packet families grow.

entries.legacy_obligation: PM decides whether material is sufficient, creates bounded research packages when needed, and only absorbs reviewed research into product or route decisions.
entries.missing_work: Runtime now covers material scan, reviewer direct sufficiency payloads, PM absorb-or-research, research package, capability decision, sealed research packet relay, worker research result relay, reviewer research check, PM research absorption, and PM material understanding. Keep adding field-level validators as schemas grow.

entries.legacy_obligation: Worker output is only a pointer until the reviewer personally checks it and returns a report to PM.
entries.missing_work: Extend exact node/version matching to repair packets and dedicated officer-model reports.

entries.legacy_obligation: Process and product FlowGuard officers own modelability, model execution, risk tiers, and confidence boundaries before PM uses model results.
entries.missing_work: Product architecture, root-contract modelability, route-draft process/product checks, the generic PM role-work request channel, and officer request lifecycle are runtime-gated. Add richer field-level product/process report contracts when new modeling packet families are introduced.

entries.legacy_obligation: The active route/frontier drive current node work; PM chooses current-node packets, reviewer checks results, and Controller does not create new nodes.
entries.missing_work: Parent/module sibling traversal is covered. Add full repair sibling replacement policy beyond the current active subtree resolver.

entries.legacy_obligation: Blocking findings structurally mutate the route and mark affected evidence stale before work continues.
entries.missing_work: Add dedicated route mutation card, stale evidence ledger updates, and a FlowGuard route-mutation/current-node-loop model.

entries.legacy_obligation: Heartbeat/manual resume wakes through a stable launcher, loads current-run state, rehydrates roles, asks PM for recovery, and re-enters packet-gated Controller loop.
entries.missing_work: Add production replay adapter later if resume evidence grows beyond the current router state file checks.

entries.legacy_obligation: Completion requires PM-built current-route ledger, stale evidence/resource disposition, reviewer terminal backward replay, PM segment decisions, and PM completion approval.
entries.missing_work: Defect-ledger, role-memory, and continuation-quarantine reconciliation now run before final ledger and terminal closure. Keep closure reconciliation aligned as new ledger families are added.

entries.legacy_obligation: Formal runs display user-facing route signs in chat or Cockpit; raw FlowGuard graphs are diagnostic only.
entries.missing_work: Startup display-surface state, chat route sign, canonical route_state_snapshot.json, and route-display refresh evidence are covered; add native Cockpit rendering/integration later.

entries.legacy_obligation: Retired recovery scripts, old route state, old screenshots, old icons, and old concept assets stay out of the active runtime path.
entries.missing_work: Continuation quarantine now blocks prior-run files, old assets, and old agent ids from current authority by default. Expand this into explicit imported-asset disposition when continuation imports old files.

entries.legacy_obligation: FlowPilot skill improvement observations are recorded separately from project acceptance and never block current project completion.
entries.missing_work: Add runtime cards and router events for nonblocking improvement reports.
